ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA)

wacc.description: Weighted Average Cost of Capital — annual discount rate (e.g. 0.09 = 9%)

terminal_growth.description: Long-run terminal growth rate (e.g. 0.025 = 2.5%). Must be < WACC.

projection_years.description: Years of explicit FCF projection before terminal value (5–10 typical)
